name: Down on the Farm Breakfast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon and reserve grease.
2. Drain potatoes and slice no more than 1/4 inch thick.
3. Brown potatoes in reserved bacon grease.
4. Add onions and green peppers to the potatoes.
5. Beat eggs with milk.
6. Break cooked bacon into small pieces and add to the egg mixture.
7. Add garlic powder and Tabasco sauce to taste.
8. Combine the ingredients and add them to the potatoes and onions.
9. Stir often until set.
